description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical glass bottle with a clear, smooth surface and a metallic screw cap. The front of the bottle features bold black text reading 'ABSOLUT VODKA' along with additional branding and descriptive text in smaller fonts, all printed directly onto the glass. The bottle is transparent, allowing visibility through to the opposite side, and the label design is classic and minimalistic, dominated by black and white. The cap is metallic and appears to be a standard screw type, fitting snugly on the narrow neck. The bottle's overall shape is sleek and modern, with a gentle taper from the body to the neck. There are no visible signs of damage, and the surface finish is glossy, reflecting light cleanly.
description: A tall, clear glass bottle with a metallic screw cap and bold black 'ABSOLUT VODKA' branding on the front. The bottle is sleek, glossy, and transparent with minimalistic black and white labeling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'ABSOLUT VODKA' branding and detailed label text clearly, with the metallic cap visible on top.
description_view_1: Angled rear-left view revealing the bottle's transparency and the continuation of the label text wrapping around the side.
description_view_2: Rear view with the label text visible in reverse through the transparent glass, and the cap centered at the top.
description_view_3: Angled rear-right view showing the bottle's smooth, clear surface and the edge of the label text wrapping around.
attribute_label_or_branding: Black and white 'ABSOLUT VODKA' branding with additional descriptive text and a circular logo printed directly on the front of the bottle.
